Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks 89 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 172 upvotes, 30 comments
  3. OpenRocket 408 upvotes, 85 comments
  4. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 158 upvotes, 28 comments
  5. On a Boat 128 upvotes, 23 comments
  6. Autoresearch for SAT Solvers 35 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 211 upvotes, 53 comments
  8. Nightingale – open-source karaoke app that works with any song on your computer 514 upvotes, 147 comments
  9. An x86-64 back end for raven-uxn 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. 2025 Turing award given for quantum information science 97 upvotes, 26 comments
  11. Explore 19th Century Scientific Correspondence 22 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. Show HN: Duplicate 3 layers in a 24B LLM, logical deduction .22→.76. No training 73 upvotes, 20 comments
  13. Show HN: Hacker News archive (47M+ items, 11.6GB) as Parquet, updated every 5m 307 upvotes, 133 comments
  14. Despite Doubts, Federal Cyber Experts Approved Microsoft Cloud Service 439 upvotes, 201 comments
  15. Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989) 848 upvotes, 413 comments
  16. What’s on HTTP? 33 upvotes, 10 comments
  17. The math that explains why bell curves are everywhere 60 upvotes, 23 comments
  18. Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) 149 upvotes, 70 comments
  19. Warranty Void If Regenerated 207 upvotes, 112 comments
  20. Show HN: Tmux-IDE, OSS agent-first terminal IDE 66 upvotes, 34 comments
  21. Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends 51 upvotes, 27 comments
  22. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root 100 upvotes, 63 comments
  23. Nvidia NemoClaw 244 upvotes, 190 comments
  24. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 273 upvotes, 226 comments
  25. OpenAI Has New Focus (on the IPO) 155 upvotes, 150 comments
  26. Czech Man's Stone in Barn's Foundations Is Rare Bronze Age Spearhead Mold 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  27. RX – a new random-access JSON alternative 10 upvotes, 6 comments
  28. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 177 upvotes, 236 comments
  29. Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet he claims will transform flying 94 upvotes, 152 comments
  30. Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework 103 upvotes, 176 comments

Last generated 10:30am, 19 March 2026. Source here.
